_comment: Asset checklist for the Design Studio photo compositor. All PNGs must be transparent and PIXEL-ALIGNED on the SAME 760x1040 canvas (identical registration), so they stack cleanly. Drop files here matching these exact names; the studio upgrades from the vector sketch to photoreal automatically. Missing files fall back gracefully.
notes: base/*.png already includes the notch lapel, single-breasted two-button front, and flap pockets — those are the defaults, so no separate layer is needed for them.

For per-fit silhouettes (recommended for realism), shoot/render four bodies and name base files base/{maximilian|edmund|josephine|maggie}-{colour}.png, then update the base layer in studio.html accordingly.
Most efficient production: build one 3D suit, then batch-export every layer as an aligned PNG from the same camera.
